Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 70% of Physical Attack plus 60% of Defense 1 time(s).
 - 25% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 70% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 60% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Physical Attack plus 70% of Defense 1 time(s).
 - 25% chance to inflict Defense Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 70% of Magic Attack.

Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 52% of Physical Attack plus 42% of Defense 2 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 25% chance to inflict Deadly Poison. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 52% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 42% of Magic Attack.

Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Physical Resistance. [Always Active]
 - Grants Defense Boost when HP is 30% or higher. [Always Active]
 - Grants Physical Attack Boost when HP is 30% or lower. [Always Active]
 - Grants Ramping Attack Boost. [Always Active]
 - 3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 180% of Physical Attack 1 time(s) upon using a basic attack 3 time(s).
 - Using a basic attack 3 time(s) has a 25% chance to inflict Deadly Poison. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Physical Resistance to 25%.

Passive (Trans).desc:
Self
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Defense Reduction to 20%.
